base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of whip_fire_impact — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. appears at whip-tip with Flame Whip or impact flash. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame flame burst — appears at whip-tip with Flame Whip or impact flash
